problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
